text: - 1.7 PPE: As further described Section 7 of the GS Construction Mountain, LLC Project Manual, Subcontractor shall be solely responsible to ensure that all of its employees, subsubcontractors and others have and use all OSHA required personal protective equipment for the various types of work they are performing. This shall include, but not necessarily be limited to: hard hats, eye protection, ear protection, safety boots, lanyards, approved ladders, respirators, dust masks, etc.
